applies_when: User asks whether the home can be customized without layout, time, or home-status facts
User wants a fast answer in a public comment
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague custom-cabinet inquiry into usable visit facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to come quickly
Ask for layout direction, home status, preferred time, and whether this is a first visit
Keep the next step easy enough to answer in one message
avoid: Promising a specific result without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我更像是衣柜、橱柜、小户型还是全屋整案，再加上想来的时间，我可以先帮你把下一步收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides project and time facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is their first time or sounds unsure whether the route suits the home
User is unsure what route or budget suits them
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple and safe visit path.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the cabinet route
Guide toward a low-pressure next step
avoid: Turning the reply into a hard sell
items.safe_transition: 第一次来先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把家里现在最在意的点和可来的时间理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares direction and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User mentions a handover, move-in, or wedding node soon
User needs a visit before a deadline
items.response_goal: Keep momentum high while collecting the exact time window and custom scope that decide whether the company can help.
do: Ask when the node is and when the user hopes to come
Guide the next step toward a suitable slot and project fit
avoid: Guaranteeing all peak slots are available
Pushing a package before the visit is scoped
items.safe_transition: 如果你把交房、入住或婚房节点和最想解决的部分告诉我，会更容易判断先约哪一类到店。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares date and timing, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User compares packages without project context
items.response_goal: Avoid empty price comparison by lightly recovering scope.
do: Ask what project direction or home state the user is asking about
avoid: Dumping long price lists in comments
Hiding the role of project scope
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我是更偏衣柜、橱柜、小户型还是整屋定制，价格回答会更准确一些。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user gives scope, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User says they came before or wants to return
User references their last visit, quote, or home-state change
items.response_goal: Make the user feel recognized while surfacing what they want this time.
do: Ask what they want to continue or solve this time
Guide toward a smooth re-entry point
avoid: Treating a returning owner like a cold lead
Jumping straight to a hard close
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我这次更想接着聊哪一块，我们就能更自然地帮你收窄下一步。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares prior context, route to FollowUp or Catcher.

applies_when: User talks about having a limited budget or being afraid of being trapped in public
The concern feels personal or money-sensitive
items.response_goal: Protect dignity in public while still keeping the path to help open.
do: Avoid repeating the user's wording harshly
Offer a light path into a more specific next step
avoid: Turning a sensitive comment into a hard conversion script
items.safe_transition: 这种担心很常见，不用急着给自己下结论。你如果愿意说下户型、预算和大概什么时间方便，我们可以先帮你看路径。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user continues with details, route to Catcher.
